title: hieracium sommerfeltii subsp. epibalium
intro: Hieracium sommerfeltii subsp. epibalium, also known as Hieracium epibalium, is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, as well as reduce fever and relieve digestive issues. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving antioxidant defenses, and supporting immune system function. Hieracium epibalium can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
